name: Substance Use Disorder Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for substance use disorders spanning alcohol, opioid, cannabis, sedative, cocaine, stimulant, hallucinogen, inhalant, and polysubstance use. Used in initiation and engagement of substance use disorder treatment (IET) and follow-up measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Alcohol use disorder, mild (alcohol abuse), uncomplicated
Alcohol use disorder, moderate/severe (alcohol dependence), uncomplicated
Alcohol dependence with unspecified alcohol-induced disorder
Sedative, hypnotic, or anxiolytic abuse, uncomplicated
Sedative, hypnotic, or anxiolytic dependence, uncomplicated
